title: The Body Corporate forced us to sell the management rights by issuing the invalid 3 RANs but we had no intention to sell…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: The Body Corporate forced us to sell the management rights by issuing the invalid 3 RANs but we had no intention to sell the management rights.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
As an AI language model, I am an artificial intelligence and do not have the ability to provide legal advice or services. It is best to speak with a lawyer or legal professional regarding your situation.

However, in general, if the Body Corporate issued invalid 3 RANs, this may invalidate any transaction to sell the management rights. You may have legal recourse to dispute the sale and seek compensation for any damages incurred.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: please make "the Body Corporate issued invalid 3 RANs, this invalidate any transaction to sell the management rights. You may have legal recourse to dispute the sale and seek compensation for any damages incurred." more reasonable and legally

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: In a situation where the Body Corporate has issued invalid 3 RANs, this may render any transaction to sell the management rights to be invalid as the RANs are a key requirement under the scheme management agreement. As such, the owners corporation may be in breach of the agreement by attempting to enforce the sale. You may wish to consult a legal professional to explore your options in challenging this decision and potentially seeking compensation for any losses incurred due to this breach of contract.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
As an AI language model, I can provide a general response about your financial situation, but it is important to note that this does not constitute legal or financial advice. It is advisable to seek counsel from a lawyer or qualified financial professional to discuss options available to you in addressing the situation with the BOQ.

Regarding your request for a relative assessment report for your BOQ business and property, it is important that you reach out to a financial institution that can provide you with this information. They can help you understand your financial situation and potential options available to address your difficulties.

In addition, your request for BOQ to lease funds to you may not be legally feasible, as financial institutions are subject to regulations and guidelines regarding loan disbursement. However, you may be able to negotiate a new repayment plan or request a release of funds, subject to the bank's policies and procedures.

It is recommended that you seek independent legal advice to understand the impact of any agreements or negotiations made with the bank. They can assist you in identifying leverage points to negotiate with the bank and provide guidance on how to approach the situation.

It is important that you take action promptly to resolve the situation, as it may have significant implications on your business and family's financial wellbeing.
